title: Simple Voice Chat broadcast
description: Let you broadcast voice to all the players in your server
body:
# Voice Chat Broadcast Plugin

This is a simple Fabric mod that allows you to broadcast your voice with [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat).

## Usage

- Make sure you have OP permissions or the `voicechat.broadcast` permission node
- Create and join a group called `broadcast` (Case insensitive)
- Talk in that group
- Your voice is now broadcast to every player using the voice chat mod on the server
